DOĞUŞ UNIVERSITY HOSTS 6th EDUCATION TECHNOLOGY CONFERENCE

Doğuş University has hosted the 6

th

Educational Technology Conference in Acıbadem campus, with over 2,000 participants. Within the scope of the conference, 30 workshops and 186 presentations have been delivered and 12 different topics of interest have been discussed.

Being one of the leading institutions in the education sector, we are pleased to be a part of such a great event
